title: No-cost orders
excerpt: Accept orders for no-cost line items or apply 100% off discounts for one-time payments. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/no-cost-orders.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted) - [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/no-cost-orders.md?payment-ui=embedded-page)
